name: Customeritem
query:
select
SI.name as "Invoice No:Link/Sales Invoice:120",
SI.posting_date as "Invoice Date:Date",
(select C.supplier_code from `tabCustomer` as C where SI.customer = C.name) as "Supplier Code",
SI.customer as  "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
SI.Customer_name as "Customer Name", 
SI.address_display as "Customer Address",
AD.pincode as "Pincode",
SID.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",

SID.description as "Description",
SID.qty as "Qty Sold",
SID.price_list_rate as "Unit Price",
SID.discount_amount as "Discount Amt",
SID.amount as "Amount",





(select PII.rate from `tabPurchase Invoice` PI inner join `tabPurchase Invoice Item` PII where PII.parent = PI.name and PII.item_code = (CASE 
                    WHEN SID.item_code LIKE '%%-F' THEN REPLACE(PII.item_code, '-F', '-S')
                    ELSE SID.item_code
                END)  and PI.company = %(company)s  and PI.docstatus = 1 order by PI.posting_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) as "Buying Cost"
,((select PII.rate from `tabPurchase Invoice` PI inner join `tabPurchase Invoice Item` PII where PII.parent = PI.name and PII.item_code = (CASE 
                    WHEN SID.item_code LIKE '%%-F' THEN REPLACE(PII.item_code, '-F', '-S')
                    ELSE SID.item_code
                END)  and PI.company = %(company)s and PI.docstatus = 1 order by PI.posting_date DESC LIMIT 1 )* SID.qty )as "Buying Amount",
(select WD.type from `tabItem` It inner join `tabWarehouse Details` WD where WD.parent = It.name and WD.warehouse = SI.set_warehouse and It.name = SID.item_code) as "Type"
from `tabSales Invoice` as SI
INNER JOIN `tabAddress` as AD on AD.name=SI.customer_address
INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` as SID on SID.parent=SI.name
where   SID.description <> 'Opening Invoice Item'
and SI.docstatus = 1
and SI.is_return <> 1
and SI.status <> "Credit Note Issued"
and  (DATE(SI.posting_date) between %(from_to)s and %(to_date)s)
and SI.company=%(company)s 
order by SI.name ;
